name: Sausage Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together Bisquick and grated cheddar cheese.
2. Add the cooked sausage to the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and salt.
4. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Shape the dough into small balls.
6. Flatten the balls slightly with your hands.
7. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
